# Build & Release — PowerBuilder VS Code Plugin

## 1. Propósito

Servir como índice propietario del carril build/release del repositorio.

El detalle del proceso de publicación vive en `docs/release/*`.

---

## 2. Carriles

- VSIX moderno
- PBAutoBuild
- ORCA legacy

---

## 3. Documentos propietarios relacionados

- `docs/build/orca-pbautobuild-architecture.md`
- `docs/release/release-process.md`
- `docs/release/ci-cd-architecture.md`

---

## 4. Comandos clave

- `npm run package:vsix`
- `npm run verify:vsix-contents`
- `npm run package:vsix:list`
- `npm run test:smoke:installed-vsix`
- `npm run release:verify`
